title: Luffy Enters the War: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The clash between shiki the golden lion

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Roger's ship was in a desperate situation,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But was saved by the raging weather.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In addition, Shiki had an unfortunate accident

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: I was unable to remove it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm surprised you are still alive.

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: Huh? What's that chicken doing there?

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: The location is the Marine Ford Plaza!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: I know how strong he is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: We could have taken over the world!!!
